key.name: api-key
key.description: The API key to use for requests.

key.name: api-base-url
key.description: The base URL of the API.

key.name: api-extra-headers
key.description: Extra JSON headers for requests (like OpenRouter needs).

key.name: custom-instruction
key.default: "Fix any grammar or spelling mistakes in the following text. Do not provide any additional conversational text or explanations. Only provide the final text."

key.name: blocked-words
key.description: Comma-separated list of words to block.

key.name: shortcut
key.description: Shortcut to trigger the AI text processor.
